title: Formula for comparing timeline start date to today
excerpt: IF({Timeline#Start}>TODAY(),1,100) isn’t working to compare the two dates.  is GT, LT not valid functions with dates?

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: IF({Timeline#Start}>TODAY(),1,100) isn’t working to compare the two dates. is GT, LT not valid functions with dates?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Heather,

Not without formatting them first.

Try:

IF(FORMAT_DATE({Timeline#Start},"YYYY-MM-DD")>FORMAT_DATE(TODAY(),"YYYY-MM-DD"),1,100)
